title: Try to Die
description: This mod makes it NEARLY impossible to die in Minecraft. Come try it out....
body:
A chaotic Minecraft Fabric mod that turns dangerous things into weird, funny, and sometimes wholesome moments.

Designed for players who want a cursed survival experience where almost nothing behaves normally anymore.

## Features
Beds no longer explode

### Trying to sleep in the Nether or End will no longer kill you.

Instead:

sleeping is blocked
a mysterious message appears in chat
after multiple attempts, the messages become stranger...
Iron Golems are peaceful

### Iron Golems will never attack players.

If you hit one:

it forgives you
drops a poppy
sends a message in chat
Bees heal you

### Bee stings no longer poison or damage you.

Instead:

you get healed
heart particles appear
a magical sound plays
Ghast & Blaze fireballs removed

### Fireballs get deleted before they can hurt you.

Includes:

splash particles
extinguish sounds
End Crystals disabled

### End Crystals cannot explode anymore.

Instead:

they disappear instantly
smoke particles appear
Hostile mobs vanish near players

### Most hostile mobs instantly disappear when approaching you.

Includes:

smoke particles
sound effects
TNT reversal

Primed TNT turns back into a normal TNT block before exploding.

### Slow Falling forever

Players permanently receive Slow Falling effects.

Includes:

cloud particles while falling
Void protection

Falling into the void launches you back upward and heals you.

## Fire heals you

Being on fire no longer hurts.

Instead:

flames are extinguished
you get healed
heart particles appear
Hunger protection

## Losing hunger instantly restores your food bar.

A mysterious message from Herobrine appears in chat...

## Cactus remover

Nearby cactus blocks instantly break themselves.

## Sweet berries & Wither roses decay

Dangerous plants transform into dead bushes.

## Arrow redirect system

Hostile arrows fly back toward the mob that shot them.

### Requirements
Minecraft Fabric
Fabric API
Warning

This mod heavily changes survival gameplay and is intentionally absurd.

Not recommended for serious balancing.
